meta.setting: State-line reaches, county-edge roads, ferry landings, border posts, deputy habits, and disputed warrants north of French Gulch
meta.rdr_clone_target: RDR-clone western with jurisdiction pressure, fugitive routes, freight papers, border gossip, and thin law

research_grounding.title: NPS Whiskeytown History and Culture
research_grounding.use: Road movement, mining communities, ranching, logging, and settlement pressure around Whiskeytown.

research_grounding.title: California State Parks Shasta State Historic Park
research_grounding.use: Northern California courthouse, town, and commerce texture for law and papers.

generation_prompt.task: Generate the State-Line Reaches region page for the 1899 Jefferson State western packet. This JSON contains shape and guidance only.
page_shape: H3 local marker line in the register of Border Post, Ferry Mud, and Folded Warrant
square image reference immediately after the marker line
opening blockquote built as three short generated lines: border object, road or paper detail, plain table meaning
two compact paragraphs establishing the reaches as jurisdiction gap, fugitive route, freight-paper checkpoint, deputy boundary, and rumor filter
closing blockquote that gives a generated state-line sign and practical table meaning
generation_guidance: Generate state-line reaches as practical border country: leaning posts, ferry mud, county papers, deputy habits, freight ledgers, old road forks, and men who know which sheriff stops where.
Give the table hooks around a warrant that loses force, a wagon with wrong papers, a fugitive waiting for dusk, a deputy asking for help he cannot command, or a toll man selling route news.
Make the law uneven and playable; the page should guide who can act, who hesitates, what papers matter, and how news changes when it crosses a line.
Keep the border physical: dust, ferry rope, wet boots, road forks, axle ruts, courthouse wax, and a post that nobody trusts to be in the right place.
generation_prompt.hand_cut_note: A line on paper should turn into mud, delay, and somebody pretending not to know a name.
generation_prompt.table_spark: A state-line scene should ask whose law reaches this far, who crossed first, what paper is missing, and who profits from confusion.
must_preserve: Use 1899 western road, law, freight, and border language only.
The generated page must include image path images/state-line-reaches.jpg.
The prompt must not contain final prose, final blockquotes, or finished field marks.
avoid: do not mention any prior packet, inherited taxonomy, or non-western source language
do not make the border abstract, mystical, or symbolic without practical effect
do not include modern border patrol equipment, automobiles, paved highways, reflective signs, passports, radios, or barcode paperwork
self_check: The future markdown follows the exact heading sequence.
The future page is about state-line reaches as jurisdiction pressure, route choice, papers, and scene engine.
The prompt contains no finished page prose.
All language belongs to grounded 1899 Jefferson State western play.
